Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
C. Zane Becker, Esq. (408) 564-6909 LAW OFFICE OF C. ZANE BECKER for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Mr. Becker submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FAROOQ MALIK's Motion For Leave To File A Cross-Complaint.

Defendant's unopposed "motion for leave to file a cross-complaint" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
C. Zane Becker, Esq. (408) 564-6909 LAW OFFICE OF C. ZANE BECKER for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Mr. Becker submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FAROOQ MALIK MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
